text:
Multiple Sclerosis and Transverse Myelitis - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
MUSDYS_COMBINED Muscular Dystrophy - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
MUSDYS_MEDICAID Muscular Dystrophy - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
MUSDYS_MEDICARE Muscular Dystrophy - Medicare Only Claims 0
